title: From Public Health to Modern Web Development — My Real, Unfiltered Story
description: How I went from failing university entrance exams to building production-ready websites with Next.js during internet blackouts.
author: Omid

seo.metaTitle: My Journey from Public Health to Web Development — Omid Bagheri
seo.metaDescription: The real story of Omid Bagheri, full-stack developer. From failing Konkoor to learning React during internet blackouts and building real products with Next.js.

blocks.content:
## Trying Everything, Searching for My Path

After that, there was no clear road ahead...
